taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Software Development, Programming Languages - Java, API Development - REST, API Development - gRPC, Database Systems - Spanner
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, Programming Languages - Java:1.0, API Development - REST:1.0, API Development - gRPC:0.0, Database Systems - Spanner:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience, 2 years of experience with software development in one or more programming languages, or 1 year of experience with an advanced degree, Experience building and consuming APIs (e.g., REST, gRPC), Experience with database systems (e.g., Spanner, BigQuery, PostgreSQL), Experience deploying and managing applications on cloud infrastructure, Experience in the Java programming language
preferred_quals: Master's degree or PhD in Computer Science or related technical fields, 2 years of experience with data structures and algorithms, Experience working on internal tools or enterprise systems and collaborating with internal stakeholders, Experience in multiple full system implementation life-cycles (e.g., analyze, design, build, test, implement, support), Experience developing accessible technologies, Familiarity with machine learning concepts and frameworks
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain extensible platforms, leveraging technologies like Agentic AI, to optimize the design, planning, and deployment of Google's technical infrastructure, Write, test, and deploy high-quality, efficient code for services supporting critical hardware and supply chain operations, taking ownership of feature development, Collaborate with partner teams (e.g., Engineering, Operations, Product) to define requirements, influence solution design, and deliver technical solutions, Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve complex issues in existing codebases, ensuring system reliability and performance, Contribute to code reviews, documentation, and the continuous improvement of engineering best practices within the team
job_summary: Google is a leading technology company that develops next-generation technologies to change how billions of users connect and interact with information. As a Software Engineer, you will design, develop, and maintain platforms to optimize Google's technical infrastructure and support supply chain operations.
